abilities.name: Sonic Resonance
abilities.narrationHints: Focused sound waves that can shake, shatter, resonate with, or gently move physical objects. Visible as shimmering pressure ripples in the air.
abilities.description: Project focused resonant waves to move, shake, or shatter matter at a distance.
abilities.notFor: Fine manipulation (it pushes, shakes, shatters — it cannot pick a lock or thread a needle); silent work (using it is always audible); affecting light or minds.

tree.name: Focused Push
tree.grants: Move, rattle, or knock over objects up to a person's weight within ~10 paces; crack brittle material (pottery, thin ice, old mortar); knock a weapon from an unready hand.
tree.cannot: No effect through solid stone; nothing heavier than a person; no sustained force — each use is a pulse.

tree.name: Standing Wave
tree.grants: Sustained pressure — hold a door shut or force it, pin a light object to a wall, shatter dense material (green wood, cheap iron fittings); shape the pulse around one ally.
tree.cannot: Cannot lift (only push); two targets max; fails in heavy interference without a check.

tree.name: Resonant Break
tree.grants: Find and exploit a structure's resonant frequency: collapse a wall section, shatter quality steel, stun everyone in a small room (nonlethal); precise enough to break one link of a chain.
tree.cannot: Not lethal by design — the field limits output near living tissue; exhausting (double energy) in Radiant territory.

abilities.name: Echo Sense
abilities.narrationHints: Sound-based perception like echolocation — hearing shapes, movement, and hollow spaces through walls and darkness.
abilities.description: Perceive your surroundings through sound reflection — even through walls, smoke, or darkness.
abilities.notFor: Reading emotion, intent, or words on a page; anything at true distance (beyond ~50 paces); seeing color or light-based detail.

tree.name: Near Echo
tree.grants: Map bodies and large objects through one wall or in darkness within ~10 paces; count people; sense sudden movement behind you.
tree.cannot: No fine detail (a face, a small tool); one wall only; loud environments blind it.

tree.name: Carried Echo
tree.grants: Range ~30 paces and two walls; distinguish individuals you know by gait and breath; overhear muffled speech as rhythm and tone (not words); sense hollow spaces and hidden voids.
tree.cannot: Still cannot resolve words reliably; running water scrambles it.

tree.name: Deep Listening
tree.grants: Hear actual words through barriers at ~20 paces; read a building's whole layout in a minute of stillness; detect the sub-sound of active nanite fields and Precursor machinery.
tree.cannot: Requires stillness — cannot deep-listen while moving or fighting; Precursor tech notices being listened to.

abilities.name: Resonant Shield
abilities.narrationHints: A standing-wave barrier of interference patterns that deflects projectiles and dampens incoming force.
abilities.description: Raise a standing-wave barrier that dampens incoming force.
abilities.notFor: Offense of any kind; protecting against gas, liquid, or light-based attacks; concealment (the barrier visibly shimmers).

tree.name: Flicker Guard
tree.grants: A heartbeat's barrier that deflects one projectile or blunts one blow; enough warning-shimmer to interrupt an ambush.
tree.cannot: One impact then gone; only protects you; cannot hold against sustained force.

tree.name: Held Chord
tree.grants: Sustain the barrier several breaths; cover yourself plus one adjacent ally; shrug off thrown stones, arrows, tool-swings.
tree.cannot: Walking pace only while held; heavy impacts (a charging animal) break it and cost you the energy anyway.

tree.name: Bulwark Harmony
tree.grants: Room-corner dome for up to four people, held a full scene if unmolested; turns crossbow bolts and a Radiant lance's first strike; can be tuned to let allies' actions pass outward.
tree.cannot: Immobile once anchored; collapses instantly if you take a hit inside it; useless against the ground shaking.

abilities.name: Harmonic Voice
abilities.narrationHints: Layered vocal overtones that soothe fear, ease tension, and lend weight to spoken words. Subtle — listeners feel it more than hear it.
abilities.description: Weave calming overtones into your speech, easing fear and hostility in those who hear you.
abilities.notFor: Domination or command (it soothes and carries, never compels); deception (a lie sung in harmony still reads as a lie); working on the deaf or on machinery.

tree.name: Calming Undertone
tree.grants: Ease fear and hostility in a conversation-sized group; steady a panicking person or animal; make your words land as sincere (when they are).
tree.cannot: Cannot change anyone's mind — only their temperature; breaks if you or an ally acts aggressively.

tree.name: Carrying Tone
tree.grants: Project clearly to a crowd or across a river without shouting; lace a negotiation with patience — hotheads get one reflexive pause before doing something irreversible.
tree.cannot: The pause is a heartbeat, not a hold; crowds beyond ~50 resist; costs double against trained Radiant negotiators.

tree.name: Concord
tree.grants: Bring a room to genuine willingness to listen — feuding parties will hear one full argument out; quiet a mob's edge; sung over the wounded, grants deep restorative sleep.
tree.cannot: Cannot make anyone agree; one use per gathering — people feel it the second time and harden.

abilities.name: Stillness Field
abilities.narrationHints: An inverted chord — a pocket of hush where sound arrives muffled and late.
abilities.description: Weave a pocket of quiet: footsteps soften, voices die at its edge.
abilities.notFor: Silencing an unwilling speaker's mind or stopping a scream already loosed; it dampens the AIR, not intent. Useless against light.

tree.name: Held Breath
tree.grants: A room-corner of hush for a few minutes — whispers stay in, ordinary noise outside arrives dulled; sleep comes easier inside it.
tree.cannot: Sudden loud sounds (a shout, a shatter) punch through; moving with it breaks it.

tree.name: Long Quiet
tree.grants: Room-sized, held near an hour; carry it at a slow walk; your own steps and works are near-silent inside.
tree.cannot: Cannot cover a second person's noise unless they stay within arm's reach; echo-senses feel the DEADNESS as clearly as noise.

tree.name: The Unspoken
tree.grants: Shape holes in the field — let one voice pass while all else stills; still an alarm bell mid-swing; grant a whole camp true rest.
tree.cannot: A Harmonic adept notices the theft of sound instantly; holding a shaped field is exhausting (double energy).

abilities.name: Tremor Sense
abilities.narrationHints: Palm or sole to earth — reading footfalls, wheels, and digging as ripples in stone and soil.
abilities.description: Read vibration through the ground: who approaches, how many, how heavy.
abilities.notFor: Anything airborne, floating, or standing still; reading intent or identity beyond gait; working from horseback or bridges of rope.

tree.name: Ground Ear
tree.grants: Feel approach through earth within ~30 paces: count walkers, tell cart from horse, catch a digger at work below.
tree.cannot: Still targets are invisible; rain and river-roar drown it; wooden floors blur everything.

tree.name: Deep Tread
tree.grants: Range ~80 paces on good ground; know a known person's gait; feel hollow spaces underfoot; sense a collapse or slide seconds early.
tree.cannot: Cannot localize precisely past 40 paces (direction and count only); a crowd is one bright smear.

tree.name: The Valley's Pulse
tree.grants: Standing still a full minute, read a hillside: every mover, every void, water veins, the grind of old machinery underground.
tree.cannot: The minute of stillness is absolute — one step resets it; Precursor works read as SILENCE, and that silence is information others notice you noticing.

abilities.name: Chord of Mending
abilities.narrationHints: Humming a material's own frequency until cracks re-seat and joints remember their fit.
abilities.description: Coax cracked or loosened things back toward wholeness by singing their grain.
abilities.notFor: Living tissue; anything shattered to fragments smaller than a thumb; undoing deliberate disassembly (a lock stays a lock).

tree.name: Re-seat
tree.grants: Close hairline cracks in pot, beam, or blade; re-tighten a sprung joint; a repaired thing holds for honest use.
tree.cannot: Cannot restore missing material; the mend shows as a bright seam; metal fatigue returns under hard strain.

tree.name: True the Frame
tree.grants: Mend structural work — a cartwheel, a roof truss, a boat's strake; blend the seam near-invisible; strengthen a sound joint beyond its original make.
tree.cannot: An hour's hum per major mend; cannot work while anything hammers or shouts nearby.

tree.name: Songwright
tree.grants: Rebuild from parts: a shattered mechanism whose pieces are gathered sings itself back together under your sustained chord; mend Radiant crystal (carefully).
tree.cannot: Every missing sliver stays missing; Precursor material refuses the song outright — it has its own, and yours is not invited.

abilities.name: Voice of the Flock
abilities.narrationHints: Tone-signals layered under speech — a working crew moving as one body without a word said aloud.
abilities.description: Bind a willing group into wordless coordination through shared tone.
abilities.notFor: Unwilling or unaware participants; conveying complex ideas (it carries timing and direction, not sentences); crowds beyond a dozen.

tree.name: Work-Rhythm
tree.grants: A crew of four moves in sync — lifts, hauls, watches; simple signals (now, hold, left, danger) land instantly.
tree.cannot: Participants must have practiced with you an hour; breaks if the group scatters past shouting distance.

tree.name: Hunting Chord
tree.grants: Eight people, signals in true silence, coordination under stress — an ambush, a rescue, a night crossing; each member feels where the others are.
tree.cannot: A panicked member floods the chord with their fear; deaf companions cannot join it.

tree.name: One Body
tree.grants: A dozen move as one organism for a scene — a bucket-line, a fighting retreat, a barn-raising in an afternoon; the group ROLLS as if led by your presence.
tree.cannot: When it ends, all of you feel the sudden loneliness; over-use breeds dependence a village elder will name to your face.

abilities.name: Resonant Anchor
abilities.narrationHints: A standing wave locking body to bedrock — the unmovable stance.
abilities.description: Root yourself: for a while, you cannot be pushed, dragged, or swept.
abilities.notFor: Moving while anchored (that is the whole price); protecting against blades or beams; anchoring on water or loose sand.

tree.name: Set Stance
tree.grants: Hold against a strong man's shove, a panicked animal, a river current to the waist; keep your feet in a quake's first shock.
tree.cannot: One anchored spot — lifting a foot ends it; your arms are braced too (no fine work while holding).

tree.name: Breakwater
tree.grants: Hold a rope against a falling weight, be the fixed point a climber trusts, stand in a floodgate current; one ally may brace THROUGH you.
tree.cannot: Sustained crushing force wins eventually (minutes, not hours); the ground itself must be sound.

tree.name: Mountain's Patience
tree.grants: Anchor against a rockslide's edge, a stampede, a Radiant lance's push; while anchored, your voice carries the stillness of something older than the argument.
tree.cannot: You are a fixed target for anything ranged; unanchoring after a long hold costs a full breather.

abilities.name: Drumline Stride
abilities.narrationHints: Footfalls locked to an inner drum — each stride landing on the beat where the ground gives back its push.
abilities.description: Run on rhythm: bursts of speed and sure footing where the beat carries you.
abilities.notFor: Stealth (the rhythm wants to be HEARD); climbing; anything requiring you to stop suddenly on the first beat.

tree.name: Catch the Beat
tree.grants: A sprint half again your best over open ground; sure feet across a known path in the dark; land jumps you'd normally balk at.
tree.cannot: Broken ground breaks the beat; the burst lasts a few hundred paces, then the debt comes due in wind.

tree.name: Carried Cadence
tree.grants: Hold the stride a mile; carry a burden at speed; pass the beat to one runner beside you.
tree.cannot: Cornering hard drops the rhythm; a stumble at speed is a REAL fall.

tree.name: Thunder-Step
tree.grants: For a dozen heartbeats, outrun a horse; cross a collapsing surface before it finishes falling; arrive with momentum that counts as force.
tree.cannot: Once per scene; the stop costs a slide of several body-lengths — plan the landing or eat it.

abilities.name: Shatterpoint
abilities.narrationHints: Listening for the flaw-note — the one place where a structure's song goes thin.
abilities.description: Find the single point where a thing will break: strike there, or warn of it.
abilities.notFor: Living creatures' bodies; finding MORAL or social weaknesses; anything whose structure you cannot spend a quiet minute reading.

tree.name: Flaw-Note
tree.grants: A minute's study names the weakest point of a door, a wall section, a machine housing — your next strike or lever there counts double.
tree.cannot: Knowing the point is not reaching it; sound-dead materials (lead, cloth, water) keep their secrets.

tree.name: Read the Load
tree.grants: See where a bridge, scaffold, or dam WILL fail and when; sabotage that looks like age; certify a structure safe with real authority.
tree.cannot: Predictions hold only while loads stay as read; a lie about what you read is still a lie.

tree.name: The Thin Song
tree.grants: Read a mechanism mid-motion; call the shatterpoint of a Harmonic shield or Radiant lattice in a single held breath; your warning shouted in time counts as an ally's reroll.
tree.cannot: Reading Precursor work at this depth is a two-way door — log what you learn AND accept being learned.

abilities.name: Echo Memory
abilities.narrationHints: Old sound never fully leaves a place — coaxing walls and stone to give back what they heard.
abilities.description: Draw recent sounds back out of a quiet place: voices, footsteps, the shape of what happened.
abilities.notFor: Places still noisy (the present drowns the past); anything older than days; images of any kind — this is sound alone.

tree.name: Lingering Note
tree.grants: In a quiet room, recover the tone of the last loud event — argument or laughter, how many voices, a door slammed or eased shut.
tree.cannot: Words stay smeared; hours old at best; open sky holds almost nothing.

tree.name: Stone Remembers
tree.grants: Recover fragments of actual words from the last day in an enclosed space; identify a known voice; hear the ORDER of events.
tree.cannot: Fragments, never transcripts; a space scrubbed by wind or a Stillness Field yields nothing — and the scrubbing itself is evidence.

tree.name: The Long Echo
tree.grants: In deep stone — a cellar, the Archive, a cave — reach back weeks; recover a conversation's spine; hear what a Precursor mechanism last said, if it spoke.
tree.cannot: Costs a night's sleep of focus; what the deep stacks answer, you cannot unhear — some echoes look back.
